case_title: HARVELL, GLEN VS KAPLAN MAX CORP OF MISSION JEWELRY AND LOAN CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY HARVELL, GLEN AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN MAX CORP OF MISSION JEWELRY AND LOAN CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
INVALID POS. AGENT FOR SERVICE NOT INDICATED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARVELL, GLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAPLAN MAX CORP OF MISSION JEWELRY AND LOAN CO. PLTF STILL HAS $250 CREDIT FROM DEFT. COURT'S DE- CISION MEANS THAT PLTF IS NOT ENTITLED TO A REFUND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
